title: Preflop Opening Ranges (9-max)
body_markdown:
## Preflop Opening Ranges

Use these ranges as a baseline and adjust based on player tendencies.

| Position | Range |
|----------|-------|
| UTG | 15% |
| UTG+1 | 17% |
| MP | 20% |
| HJ | 25% |
| CO | 33% |
| BTN | 45% |
| SB | 55% |

### Key adjustments

- **vs OMC** (Old Man Coffee): tighten pre, widen for value post-flop — they fold too often to cbets
- **vs PLF** (Pure Loose Fish): call more, bluff less — value bet relentlessly
- **vs GTO** bot: use balanced ranges, mixed strategies on borderline hands
